description: This is a false-colour composite satellite image, acquired by SPOT-5 at 2.5 m resolution on 2011-06-28, using a 1/2/3 band combination. The image depicts a landscape identified as the Araslövssjöområdet Natura 2000 site in Sweden. A prominent, meandering river appears in bright cyan, indicating water. The river is flanked by linear strips of dark reddish-brown vegetation, characteristic of riparian zones or forested areas. Surrounding the river and vegetation are extensive agricultural fields, appearing in varying shades of bright pink and red (representing vigorous vegetation) and lighter greenish-blue (indicating less vigorous vegetation or bare soil). In the upper left area, a settlement is visible as light-coloured structures with small dark dots. A faint white line, likely a track or road, is visible crossing the landscape and extending towards the river. The image source is CNES 2011©, distributed by Airbus DS/Spot Image.
